selection_rule: First 90 ranked sovereign-state rows by total area from the cited Wikipedia reference page; unranked dependencies, Antarctica, and disputed entries are skipped.

source.name: Wikipedia: List of countries and dependencies by area
source.basis: Ranked sovereign-state rows 1 through 90 by total area; unranked Antarctica/dependencies/disputed entries are excluded.
source.upstream_sources: United Nations Statistics Division, FAO, CIA World Factbook, and per-row official sources as summarized by the Wikipedia reference table.
